summary: A Go-based monolithic tool leveraging MCP for test orchestration and Goss configuration migration, currently undergoing AI-agent-driven test expansion.
concerns: Build failure in agent 0011 due to undefined TestResult type in tap.go
Proliferation of agent-generated test directories suggests fragmented test coverage strategy
Potential code duplication across multiple agent-generated internal/ test folders
suggestions: Fix the undefined TestResul... build error in internal/reporter/tap.go immediately
Consolidate agent-generated extra tests into the main test files to reduce maintenance overhead
Verify the MCP handlers are properly covered by integration tests
